message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have the account ending in ****1184 with a current amount due of 8400. Confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last two digits are 02, but I still can’t make any payment right now.
Understood. I will note hardship and no capacity to pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I’m unemployed right now and can’t commit to anything.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Next stage should not repeat identity verification or the 21-day income question. Next priority: route for hardship review / next-step discussion by phone."}
